% vmap-test.tex -- two versions x (student + solutions) = four copies in one
% combined PDF, so autoexam_run_versions opens a .vmap and records one marker per
% copy (autoexam.cls's \AutoExamVmapOpen/Record/Close).  test_engine_correctness.py
% parses the emitted markers and pdftotext-slices each copy's page range.
\documentclass{autoexam}
\versions{A,B}
\setexamseed{7}
\solutions
\examsetup{number=1, date={Engine Test}}
\loadbank{vmap-bank.tex}

\begin{document}
\begin{problems}
	\problem{vprob}
\end{problems}
\end{document}
